We're seeing small amounts of stock missing in the electronic components category that don't line up with our digital logs. Can you help me look at these numbers and suggest what might be causing the variance?

| SKU | Description | System Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| EC-9902 | Micro-controller Unit (MCU) | 1,450 | 1,442 | -8 |
| EC-4410 | Resistor Array 10k | 12,000 | 11,985 | -15 |
| EC-1128 | Ceramic Capacitor 10uF | 5,600 | 5,594 | -6 |
| EC-0054 | Voltage Regulator | 890 | 887 | -3 |

The numbers are small but they're happening consistently every week.
